home.title: very-princess — Stellar Payout Registry
home.description: A decentralised payout registry for open-source maintainers, built on Stellar Soroban. Connect your Freighter wallet to view and claim your payouts.
home.hero_description: A transparent, on-chain system for multi-organization maintenance payouts. Organizations register, allocate, and maintainers self-custody their contributions — all on Stellar.
home.badge_text: Built on Stellar Soroban · Drips Wave 4
home.footer_text: very-princess is open source — MIT Licensed

on_chain.title: On-chain Registry
on_chain.description: Organizations and maintainers are registered directly on Stellar Soroban — transparent and tamper-proof.

instant_payouts.title: Instant Payouts
instant_payouts.description: Org admins allocate payouts on-chain. Maintainers claim their accumulated balance in a single transaction.

self_custodial.title: Self-custodial
self_custodial.description: No intermediary holds your funds. Claim directly to your Freighter wallet — your keys, your XLM.

open_source.title: Open Source
open_source.description: Built for the Drips community funding model. Fork it, extend it, contribute. See CONTRIBUTING.md.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.select_organization: Select an organization to get started
